posts.author: P2018
posts.text: Helps them on production in Bakrol and Cambay fields. They do not pay any royalty in Karjisan. Incrementally positive and should boost near term earnings. Structurally its a great way to explore additional wells. Entire ecosystem benefits!

posts.author: NishaP
posts.text: India cuts royalty burden on oil and gas producers in push for domestic output - The Economic Times

posts.author: Prdnt_investor
posts.text: Excellent post from @suru27 scientificinvesting.substack.com The Oilfield That Finally Breathed Sometimes, nothing happens for decades and then decades happen in a year. Such is story of Antelopus Selan where sales tripled between FY22-25. So, what is in store going for future? Let us explore.

posts.author: P2018
posts.text: Delivering as per expectations. Selan ended the year with 90 cr PAT. Q4 nos are 200% sales growth and 250% Management team committed to 1800 boepd which was delivered while a 40% growth planned for 2027 at 2500 boepd throgugh owne cash flows. BS is back to 120 crs of cash to fund further drilling. image 1033×755 218 KB image 974×757 161 KB

posts.author: P2018
posts.text: Not for the company but you can look at the likes of Jindal Drilling which provide jack up rigs. The problem in the business is that there is only one customer (ONGC) to which these guys provide off shore rigs and these guys tender rates at ridiculously low levels. I mean compare Jindal’s rig rates to international peers such as Valaris etc. It’s a joke that they ask for bids at USD50k while international bids are topping at USD100k+. The issue with the oil exploration space is the underinvestment that has happened not only from the government but also from public markets (not only in India bu…

posts.author: arvghy
posts.text: Can this be positive for the company & space overall ETEnergyworld.com ONGC floats $20 billion global tender for deepwater rigs The state-run company issued a tender last month to accelerate hydrocarbon exploration and enhance India's energy security, with a tight 80-day mobilization deadline indicating significant urgency.
